word: G1340 - διϊσχυρίζομαι - diïschyrízomai - dee-is-khoo-rid'-zom-ahee - Confidently affirm

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to lean upon, to affirm stoutly, to assert confidently
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1223 and a derivative of G2478; to stout it through, that is, asseverate: - confidently (constantly) affirm.
